channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Hunter Biden charms his trolls, earning the nickname 'MAGA whisperer'
item.description: Hunter Biden is staging an unlikely reinvention in politics, attempting to charm and disarm the internet trolls who targeted him during his father's presidency.

item.title: Medical innovation reaches a breakthrough moment
item.description: Recent scientific investments yield results as researchers announce promising advances against cancers and other diseases.

item.title: Exclusive: Kamala Harris takes redistricting fight to Louisiana
item.description: Former Vice President Kamala Harris plans a trip to New Orleans as Democrats challenge a Supreme Court ruling that could reduce their political power.

item.title: Scoop: Trump's Iran envoys quietly convene nuclear experts in Tennessee
item.description: President Trump's envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner visited the Oak Ridge national lab for consultations with nuclear experts.
